ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَيْلٌ لِّلْمُطَفِّفِينَ ١
ayahs.translation: Woe to those who give less [than due],

ayahs.textUthmani: ٱلَّذِينَ إِذَا ٱكْتَالُوا۟ عَلَى ٱلنَّاسِ يَسْتَوْفُونَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: ٱلَّذِينَ إِذَا ٱكْتَالُواْ عَلَى ٱلنَّاسِ يَسْتَوْفُونَ ٢
ayahs.textIndopak: الَّذِيۡنَ اِذَا اكۡتَالُوۡا عَلَى النَّاسِ يَسۡتَوۡفُوۡنَۖ‏
ayahs.translation: Who, when they take a measure from people, take in full.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَإِذَا كَالُوهُمْ أَو وَّزَنُوهُمْ يُخْسِرُونَ ٣
ayahs.translation: But if they give by measure or by weight to them, they cause loss.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: أَلَا يَظُنُّ أُوْلَـٰٓئِكَ أَنَّهُم مَّبْعُوثُونَ ٤
ayahs.translation: Do they not think that they will be resurrected

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: لِيَوْمٍ عَظِيمٍ ٥
ayahs.translation: For a tremendous Day -

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: يَوْمَ يَقُومُ ٱلنَّاسُ لِرَبِّ ٱلْعَـٰلَمِينَ ٦
ayahs.translation: The Day when mankind will stand before the Lord of the worlds?

ayahs.textUthmani: كَلَّآ إِنَّ كِتَـٰبَ ٱلْفُجَّارِ لَفِى سِجِّينٍ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: كَلَّآ إِنَّ كِتَـٰبَ ٱلْفُجَّارِ لَفِى سِجِّينٍ ٧
ayahs.textIndopak: كَلَّاۤ اِنَّ كِتٰبَ الۡفُجَّارِ لَفِىۡ سِجِّيۡنٍؕ‏
ayahs.translation: No! Indeed, the record of the wicked is in sijjeen.
ayahs.transliteration: Kallaaa inna kitaabal fujjaari lafee Sijjeen

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَمَآ أَدْرَٮٰكَ مَا سِجِّينٌ ٨
ayahs.translation: And what can make you know what is sijjeen?

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: كِتَـٰبٌ مَّرْقُومٌ ٩
ayahs.translation: It is [their destination recorded in] a register inscribed.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَيْلٌ يَوْمَئِذٍ لِّلْمُكَذِّبِينَ ١٠
ayahs.translation: Woe, that Day, to the deniers,

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: ٱلَّذِينَ يُكَذِّبُونَ بِيَوْمِ ٱلدِّينِ ١١
ayahs.translation: Who deny the Day of Recompense.

ayahs.textUthmani: وَمَا يُكَذِّبُ بِهِۦٓ إِلَّا كُلُّ مُعْتَدٍ أَثِيمٍ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَمَا يُكَذِّبُ بِهِۦٓ إِلَّا كُلُّ مُعْتَدٍ أَثِيمٍ ١٢
ayahs.textIndopak: وَمَا يُكَذِّبُ بِهٖۤ اِلَّا كُلُّ مُعۡتَدٍ اَثِيۡمٍۙ‏
ayahs.translation: And none deny it except every sinful transgressor.
ayahs.transliteration: Wa-maa yukazzibu biheee illaa kullu mu'tadin aseem

ayahs.textUthmani: إِذَا تُتْلَىٰ عَلَيْهِ ءَايَـٰتُنَا قَالَ أَسَـٰطِيرُ ٱلْأَوَّلِينَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: إِذَا تُتْلَىٰ عَلَيْهِ ءَايَـٰتُنَا قَالَ أَسَـٰطِيرُ ٱلْأَوَّلِينَ ١٣
ayahs.textIndopak: اِذَا تُتۡلٰى عَلَيۡهِ اٰيٰتُنَا قَالَ اَسَاطِيۡرُ الۡاَوَّلِيۡنَؕ‏
ayahs.translation: When Our verses are recited to him, he says, "Legends of the former peoples."
ayahs.transliteration: Izaa tutlaa 'alaihi aayaatunaa qaala asaateerul awwaleen

ayahs.textUthmani: كَلَّا ۖ بَلْ ۜ رَانَ عَلَىٰ قُلُوبِهِم مَّا كَانُوا۟ يَكْسِبُونَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: كَلَّا‌ۖ بَلْۜ رَانَ عَلَىٰ قُلُوبِهِم مَّا كَانُواْ يَكْسِبُونَ ١٤
ayahs.textIndopak: كَلَّا​ بَلۡ رَانَ عَلٰى قُلُوۡبِهِمۡ مَّا كَانُوۡا يَكۡسِبُوۡنَ‏
ayahs.translation: No! Rather, the stain has covered their hearts of that which they were earning.
ayahs.transliteration: Kallaa bal raana 'alaa quloobihim maa kaanoo yaksiboon

ayahs.textUthmani: كَلَّآ إِنَّهُمْ عَن رَّبِّهِمْ يَوْمَئِذٍ لَّمَحْجُوبُونَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: كَلَّآ إِنَّهُمْ عَن رَّبِّهِمْ يَوْمَئِذٍ لَّمَحْجُوبُونَ ١٥
ayahs.textIndopak: كَلَّاۤ اِنَّهُمۡ عَنۡ رَّبِّهِمۡ يَوۡمَٮِٕذٍ لَّمَحۡجُوۡبُوۡنَ​ؕ‏
ayahs.translation: No! Indeed, from their Lord, that Day, they will be partitioned.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: ثُمَّ إِنَّهُمْ لَصَالُواْ ٱلْجَحِيمِ ١٦
ayahs.translation: Then indeed, they will [enter and] burn in Hellfire.

ayahs.textUthmani: ثُمَّ يُقَالُ هَـٰذَا ٱلَّذِى كُنتُم بِهِۦ تُكَذِّبُونَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: ثُمَّ يُقَالُ هَـٰذَا ٱلَّذِى كُنتُم بِهِۦ تُكَذِّبُونَ ١٧
ayahs.textIndopak: ثُمَّ يُقَالُ هٰذَا الَّذِىۡ كُنۡتُمۡ بِهٖ تُكَذِّبُوۡنَؕ‏
ayahs.translation: Then it will be said [to them], "This is what you used to deny."
ayahs.transliteration: Summa yuqaalu haazal lazee kuntum bihee tukazziboon

ayahs.textUthmani: كَلَّآ إِنَّ كِتَـٰبَ ٱلْأَبْرَارِ لَفِى عِلِّيِّينَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: كَلَّآ إِنَّ كِتَـٰبَ ٱلْأَبْرَارِ لَفِى عِلِّيِّينَ ١٨
ayahs.textIndopak: كَلَّاۤ اِنَّ كِتٰبَ الۡاَبۡرَارِ لَفِىۡ عِلِّيِّيۡنَؕ‏
ayahs.translation: No! Indeed, the record of the righteous is in ʿilliyyūn.
ayahs.transliteration: Kallaaa inna kitaabal abraari lafee'il liyyeen

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَمَآ أَدْرَٮٰكَ مَا عِلِّيُّونَ ١٩
ayahs.translation: And what can make you know what is ʿilliyyūn?

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: كِتَـٰبٌ مَّرْقُومٌ ٢٠
ayahs.translation: It is [their destination recorded in] a register inscribed

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: يَشْهَدُهُ ٱلْمُقَرَّبُونَ ٢١
ayahs.translation: Which is witnessed by those brought near [to Allāh].

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: إِنَّ ٱلْأَبْرَارَ لَفِى نَعِيمٍ ٢٢
ayahs.translation: Indeed, the righteous will be in pleasure

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: عَلَى ٱلْأَرَآئِكِ يَنظُرُونَ ٢٣
ayahs.translation: On adorned couches, observing.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: تَعْرِفُ فِى وُجُوهِهِمْ نَضْرَةَ ٱلنَّعِيمِ ٢٤
ayahs.translation: You will recognize in their faces the radiance of pleasure.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: يُسْقَوْنَ مِن رَّحِيقٍ مَّخْتُومٍ ٢٥

words.translation: They will be given to drink

ayahs.translation: They will be given to drink [pure] wine [which was] sealed.

ayahs.textUthmani: خِتَـٰمُهُۥ مِسْكٌ ۚ وَفِى ذَٰلِكَ فَلْيَتَنَافَسِ ٱلْمُتَنَـٰفِسُونَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: خِتَـٰمُهُۥ مِسْكٌ‌ۚ وَفِى ذَٲلِكَ فَلْيَتَنَافَسِ ٱلْمُتَنَـٰفِسُونَ ٢٦
ayahs.textIndopak: خِتٰمُهٗ مِسۡكٌ ​ؕ وَفِىۡ ذٰلِكَ فَلۡيَتَنَافَسِ الۡمُتَنــَافِسُوۡنَؕ‏
ayahs.translation: The last of it is musk. So for this let the competitors compete.
ayahs.transliteration: Khitaamuhoo misk; Wa-fee zaalika falyatanaafasil Mutanaafisoon

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَمِزَاجُهُۥ مِن تَسْنِيمٍ ٢٧
ayahs.translation: And its mixture is of Tasneem,

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: عَيْنًا يَشْرَبُ بِهَا ٱلْمُقَرَّبُونَ ٢٨
ayahs.translation: A spring from which those near [to Allāh] drink.

ayahs.textUthmani: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ أَجْرَمُوا۟ كَانُوا۟ مِنَ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ يَضْحَكُونَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ أَجْرَمُواْ كَانُواْ مِنَ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ يَضْحَكُونَ ٢٩
ayahs.textIndopak: اِنَّ الَّذِيۡنَ اَجۡرَمُوۡا كَانُوۡا مِنَ الَّذِيۡنَ اٰمَنُوۡا يَضۡحَكُوۡنَ  ۖ‏
ayahs.translation: Indeed, those who committed crimes used to laugh at those who believed.
ayahs.transliteration: Innal lazeena ajramoo kaanoo minal lazeena aamanoo yadhakoon

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَإِذَا مَرُّواْ بِهِمْ يَتَغَامَزُونَ ٣٠
ayahs.translation: And when they passed by them, they would exchange derisive glances.

ayahs.textUthmani: وَإِذَا ٱنقَلَبُوٓا۟ إِلَىٰٓ أَهْلِهِمُ ٱنقَلَبُوا۟ فَكِهِينَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَإِذَا ٱنقَلَبُوٓاْ إِلَىٰٓ أَهْلِهِمُ ٱنقَلَبُواْ فَكِهِينَ ٣١
ayahs.textIndopak: وَاِذَا انۡقَلَبُوۡۤا اِلٰٓى اَهۡلِهِمُ انْقَلَبُوۡا فَكِهِيۡنَ  ۖ‏
ayahs.translation: And when they returned to their people, they would return jesting.
ayahs.transliteration: Wa-izan qalabooo ilaaa ahlihimun qalaboo fakiheen

ayahs.textUthmani: وَإِذَا رَأَوْهُمْ قَالُوٓا۟ إِنَّ هَـٰٓؤُلَآءِ لَضَآلُّونَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَإِذَا رَأَوْهُمْ قَالُوٓاْ إِنَّ هَـٰٓؤُلَآءِ لَضَآلُّونَ ٣٢
ayahs.textIndopak: وَاِذَا رَاَوۡهُمۡ قَالُوۡۤا اِنَّ هٰٓؤُلَاۤءِ لَـضَآلُّوۡنَۙ‏
ayahs.translation: And when they saw them, they would say, "Indeed, those are truly lost."
ayahs.transliteration: Wa-izaa ra-awhum qaalooo inna haaa'ulaaa'i ladaaal-loon

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَمَآ أُرْسِلُواْ عَلَيْهِمْ حَـٰفِظِينَ ٣٣
ayahs.translation: But they had not been sent as guardians over them.

ayahs.textUthmani: فَٱلْيَوْمَ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ مِنَ ٱلْكُفَّارِ يَضْحَكُونَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَٱلْيَوْمَ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ مِنَ ٱلْكُفَّارِ يَضْحَكُونَ ٣٤
ayahs.textIndopak: فَالۡيَوۡمَ الَّذِيۡنَ اٰمَنُوۡا مِنَ الۡكُفَّارِ يَضۡحَكُوۡنَۙ‏
ayahs.translation: So Today those who believed are laughing at the disbelievers,
ayahs.transliteration: Fal-yawmal lazeena aamanoo minal kuffaari yadhakoon

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: عَلَى ٱلْأَرَآئِكِ يَنظُرُونَ ٣٥
ayahs.translation: On adorned couches, observing.

ayahs.textUthmani: هَلْ ثُوِّبَ ٱلْكُفَّارُ مَا كَانُوا۟ يَفْعَلُونَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: هَلْ ثُوِّبَ ٱلْكُفَّارُ مَا كَانُواْ يَفْعَلُونَ ٣٦
ayahs.textIndopak: هَلۡ ثُوِّبَ الۡكُفَّارُ مَا كَانُوۡا يَفۡعَلُوۡنَ‏
ayahs.translation: Have the disbelievers [not] been rewarded [this Day] for what they used to do?
ayahs.transliteration: Hal suwwibal kuffaaru maa kaanoo yaf'aloon
